text:
was a park attraction featured at between 15 January 2016 to 26 June 2016. https://twitter.com/USJ_information/status/671236675423506432 It was part of the Cool Japan 2016 promotion event. It features a battle between Tenth Angel and the Evangelion units. It features an original Evangelion Unit-04 (Rapidborer Equipment), piloted by Mari Makinami Illustrious.

History

It shows an alternative version of the fight against the Tenth Angel in Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance, where the audience watches the battle against the angel within the Entry plug of Evangelion Unit-04 (Rapidborer Equipment)
